author: Arunesh Singh
description: Sync your Vectrola music wiki with Google Drive. Pull/push wiki files across devices. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Arunesh Singh
manifest.description: Sync your Vectrola music wiki with Google Drive. Pull/push wiki files across devices.
manifest.name: Vectrola Sync

name: Vectrola Sync

releases.author: Arunes007
releases.description:
## Mobile UI Improvements

### Capsule Player
- **Compressed horizontally** - 30px margins (narrower footprint)
- **Positioned above nav bar** - 70px from bottom to clear Obsidian's bottom menu
- **Removed hyperlink appearance** - Song title no longer looks like a link
- **Apple-style marquee scroll** - Title and artist names scroll left-to-right
  - Always scrolls (even short text)
  - Title and artist animate alternately

### Full Player
- **Larger control buttons** - Prev/Next icons: 36px, Play/Pause icon: 44px

### Bug Fixes
- Removed debug console.log statements
releases.name: v1.7.0 - Mobile UI Improvements

releases.author: Arunes007
releases.description:
## What's New

### Fixes
- **iOS playback support** - Uses Obsidian vault API instead of Node.js fs module
- Removed redundant "Vectrola User ID" setting

### Playback Priority
- **Desktop**: Local files (current hostname first, then others)
- **Mobile**: Vault `audio/` folder, then GDrive streaming
- **Both**: Falls back to Google Drive if local not found
releases.name: v1.6.0

releases.author: Arunes007
releases.description:
## What's New

### Features
- **Auto-discover Vectrola folders** - No folder picker needed! Plugin automatically finds `/Vectrola/wiki` and `/Vectrola/audio` folders created by the CLI
- **Media Session API** - Lock screen controls (play/pause, next/prev) on mobile and desktop

### Performance
- **MD5 checksum optimization** - Skip downloading files that haven't changed (compares local vs Drive MD5)

### Fixes
- Equalizer animation now persists across page navigation
- Fixed localhost OAuth schema
releases.name: v1.5.0

releases.author: Arunes007
releases.description:
## What's New

### 🎨 Apple Music Style Player
- Fixed icon rendering issue (SVG namespace fix)
- Safe DOM manipulation (removed innerHTML for Obsidian plugin review compliance)
- Using `setCssStyles()` for dynamic styling

### 🔧 Bug Fixes
- Fixed volume icon and slider
- Fixed column collapse on window minimize
- Remember last played song across sessions

### 📦 Files
- `main.js` - Plugin code
- `manifest.json` - Plugin manifest
- `styles.css` - Plugin styles
releases.name: v1.4.0 - Apple Music Style Player Improvements

releases.author: Arunes007
releases.description:
## What's New

### 🚀 One-Click Sign-In (No Copy-Paste!)
- **Automatic OAuth flow** - Sign in with Google, browser redirects back to Obsidian automatically
- Uses `obsidian://vectrola-auth` protocol handler for seamless token transfer
- No more copying authorization codes!

### 🔄 Auto-Refresh Settings
- Settings tab automatically updates when auth state changes
- See "Connected" status immediately after sign-in

### 🔒 Security
- Server-side token exchange (client secret never leaves server)
- CSRF protection via state parameter
- Tokens encrypted in transit via HTTPS

## Full Changelog
- v1.2.0: Progress bar, smart caching, simplified OAuth
- v1.3.0: Seamless one-click OAuth, auto-refresh UI

## Installation

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` and place them in:
```
<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/vectrola-sync/
```
releases.name: 1.3.0 - Seamless One-Click OAuth

releases.author: Arunes007
releases.description:
## What's New

### 🔐 Simplified Authentication
- **One-click Google Sign-In** - No more manual Client ID/Secret entry
- Server-side OAuth token exchange for security
- Auto token refresh

### 📊 Progress Bar
- Visual sync progress with real-time updates
- Shows downloaded (⬇️) and skipped (⏭️) counts
- Cancel button to stop sync mid-way
- Re-appears when clicking sync icon during active sync

### ⚡ Smart Caching
- MD5 hash comparison to skip unchanged files
- Dramatically faster subsequent syncs
- Cache persists across Obsidian restarts

### 🔒 Security
- Replaced innerHTML with safe DOM APIs
- No sensitive credentials stored in plugin

## Installation

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` and place them in:
```
<your-vault>/.obsidian/plugins/vectrola-sync/
```
releases.name: 1.2.0 - OAuth Improvements & Smart Caching

releases.author: Arunes007
releases.description:
## Fixes
- Use CSS classes instead of inline styles
- Use Setting API for headings
- Set correct minAppVersion (1.4.0)
releases.name: v1.0.1

releases.author: Arunes007
releases.description:
Initial release

## Features
- Sync Vectrola music wiki with Google Drive
- Pull/push wiki files across devices
- Mobile support (iPhone/Android)
- OAuth 2.0 authentication
- Auto-sync on vault open
releases.name: v1.0.0
